differential_diagnoses: Infected (mycotic) aortic aneurysm with contained rupture
next_steps: Urgent repeat CT angiography of the chest and abdomen to evaluate for progression of aortic wall changes or pseudoaneurysm formation
Transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for valvular vegetations and aortic root involvement
MRI of the thoracic spine to rule out vertebral osteomyelitis and epidural abscess
Consultation with vascular surgery for evaluation of mycotic aneurysm stability and surgical planning
Serial blood cultures to assess for clearance of S. aureus bacteremia
Infectious disease consultation for long-term parenteral antibiotic therapy
